page_title: Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo - Complete Records - Visual Story Edition
text:
is an artbook for the film Evangelion: 3.333 You Can (Not) Redo created by khara inc.. It was published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 30 June 2021 for the original price of 3,500 yen + tax. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4905033225 

Overview

An artbook with the visual story of the Evangelion: 3.333 You Can (Not) Redo film. The cover is illustrated by Takeshi Honda.

Contents

Visual Story: Full screenshots of all the film in sequence
Music cue sheet
Additional Script Collection 
Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4905033225
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4905033226
